task: RIGOURATE Reproduction + SimClaim Differentiation v1 - Readiness Gate

official_rigourate_code_available.evidence: arXiv v2 (12 Jan 2026) contains placeholder '[Github/HF Link]'; no concrete GitHub repo found via web search as of 2026-07-05

official_rigourate_data_available.evidence: 10K+ claim-evidence set described in paper but not publicly released; no HuggingFace dataset found

official_rigourate_model_available.evidence: Fine-tuned reranker and scorer weights not publicly released; no HuggingFace model found

official_reproduction_possible.evidence: blocked - no code/data/model/supplementary available; only paper text accessible

proxy_rigourate_style_baseline_completed.evidence: 3 baselines built: A=rule_scalar_score (completed, 444 rows), B=nli_scalar_score (BLOCKED - HCM/NLI features not in repo, blocked_reason recorded), C=llm_scalar_proxy (completed, 200/444 matched). All clearly labelled as proxy, NOT official RIGOURATE.

scalar_baseline_distinguishes_mild_vs_st.evidence: rule_scalar_score ROC-AUC on mild_vs_strong = 0.5062 (chance); llm_scalar_proxy ROC-AUC on mild_vs_strong = 0.5874 (weak, below 0.70 threshold). Neither scalar can reliably distinguish mild_scope_overclaim from strong_action_overclaim.

r4_outperforms_scalar_on_strong_action.evidence: On 444 silver: R4 strong_F1=0.3967 vs rule_scalar best-F1=0.3844 (R4 above by 0.0123). On 100 matched: R4 strong_F1=0.3000 vs rule_scalar strong_F1=0.1364 (R4 above by 0.1636). R4 also captures 8/24 LLM-missed strong_action cases. R4 ROC-AUC on strong_vs_nonstrong is at chance (0.4971 for rule, 0.5154 for LLM), but R4's structured routing provides screening signal that scalar compression cannot match.

claim_realism_risk_high.evidence: 21/444 (4.7%) of SimClaim claims have heuristic realism risk flags. By silver label: supported 2.7%, mild 3.6%, strong_action 9.0%, contradiction 3.6%. All below the 25% pre-registered class-level threshold. Risk is non-trivial but not high.

gold_realism_extension_needed.evidence: Non-trivial realism risk (4.7% overall, 9.0% for strong_action) motivates gold realism annotation. Two-layer gold protocol proposed: Layer 1 relation label (unchanged), Layer 2 claim_realism_score_1_to_5 + claim_realism_issue + claim_realism_usable_for_paper. Pre-registered thresholds: 25% class-level, 25% paper-level.

v3_13_revision_needed.evidence: V3.13 is positioning-only (no new experiments). RIGOURATE-style baseline results (Sections 5-7) are new experimental content that strengthens V3.13's positioning. Recommendation: create V3.14 (V3.13 + new Section VI.B RIGOURATE-style baseline results + Limitations additions), not revise V3.13 in place.

advisor_send_ready_after_revision.evidence: V3.14 paper text not yet written. Advisor cover note not yet drafted. Final quality check not yet run. Recommended sequence: draft V3.14 text, draft advisor cover note, run final quality check, then send to advisor.

main_remaining_risk.value: Three primary risks remain: (1) Official RIGOURATE artifacts not publicly available - proxy baseline is NOT official RIGOURATE and conclusions may shift when official system is released; (2) Silver-only evaluation - all conclusions are pre-gold and may shift with gold adjudication; (3) SimClaim realism risk - 4.7% overall and 9.0% for strong_action_overclaim class is non-trivial; gold realism annotation required to confirm SimClaim claims are naturalistic enough for paper tables.

recommended_next_action.value: 1. Draft V3.14 paper text: V3.13 + new Section VI.B (RIGOURATE-style scalar baseline results: 3 baselines, 4 binary tasks, 5-method comparison, case analysis) + Limitations additions (proxy caveat, realism caveat, silver-only caveat). 2. Draft advisor cover note (Chinese, per user preference) covering: V3.13 positioning revision, V3.14 baseline results, official RIGOURATE blocked status, proxy construction, scalar vs R4 comparison, realism audit, gold protocol extension. 3. Run final quality check: no proxy-as-official, no silver-as-gold, no API calls, no V3.12/V3.13 modification, no claim of reproduction success. 4. Send V3.14 + cover note to advisor. 5. Out-of-task: email RIGOURATE corresponding author (jhfjames1@sheffield.ac.uk) to request code/data release status.

summary_verdict.official_reproduction: BLOCKED - official RIGOURATE code/data/model not publicly available as of 2026-07-05
summary_verdict.proxy_baseline: COMPLETED - 3 baselines built (1 completed, 1 blocked with reason, 1 completed for matched subset); clearly labelled as proxy
summary_verdict.scalar_vs_taxonomy: Scalar CANNOT replace four-class taxonomy - scalar cannot distinguish mild vs strong (ROC-AUC <= 0.59) and cannot match R4 strong_action F1
summary_verdict.r4_screening_value: R4 RETAINS screening value - R4 strong_F1=0.3967 > scalar best-F1=0.3844; R4 captures 8/24 LLM-missed strong_action cases
summary_verdict.realism_risk: MODERATE - 4.7% overall, 9.0% for strong_action; below 25% threshold but non-trivial; gold realism annotation needed
summary_verdict.v3_14_needed: YES - V3.14 recommended (V3.13 + RIGOURATE-style baseline results section)
summary_verdict.advisor_send_ready: NO - V3.14 text and advisor cover note not yet drafted
